THIS IS THE 3RD CONSECUTIVE HOLD-FIRES-WITHOUT-REGISTRY-UPDATE EVENT (HOLDs #10, #11, #12) — MANUAL-APPROVAL-GATE HYPOTHESIS NOW CROSSES THE ANALYST'S 3-EVENT THRESHOLD AND BECOMES THE STRONG DEFAULT INTERPRETATION (per prior_poll_note 'if registry-update remains gated for a 3rd consecutive run, manual-approval-gate hypothesis becomes the strong default'). Pattern (a) 'sustained do-not-adjudicate as infrastructure' now near-certain on the daily-AI-review side; pattern (b) 'imminent batched manual edit' remains possible but loses prior weight. MANUAL-COMMIT DROUGHT now 15.98d / 383.46h — ~32 minutes from 16d threshold (ETA 2026-05-03T12:02:38Z; almost certainly crosses before next poll). 29 consecutive polls of auto-only commits (was 28); last manual a57e731 still 2026-04-17T12:02:38Z. 0 source-file touches: monitor.py 9de912a8, scripts/pull_data.py aa0573fe, scripts/build_daily_review.py ceddb04f, inject_ai_layer.py 58996a0c, verify_predictions.py db947cab, generate_manifest.js 786842ed (all SHAs identical to prior 7+ polls). ai_manifest.json byte-identical 405d5c9371aa8ad32f040528e1731eb1/14880, V51.1, last_updated=2026-04-17 unchanged; api/index.json e00e85aa8907af40778096f9a138c2d6 last_updated=2026-04-17 unchanged. Title still verbatim 'Ovoid Cavity Cosmological Model V51.1 — 69 Confirmed Registry Items'; confirmed=69, accuracy=94.5%, V51.1 unchanged; refined=4 unchanged. Parameters baseline-clean: model.html shows disc_radius 20,015 km (13 occurrences), firmament_height 8537 km (11), decay constant 8619 km (11), sun_altitude 5733 km (2), moon_altitude 2534 km (2), refraction coefficient 0.20 (1; no shift back to 0.27 — the 3 0.27 hits on predictions/wins pages are all about Polaris elevation excess in degrees, not n(r) coefficient). Repo description still null. Canary OTS-provenance trap UNCHANGED — same 4 pre-existing .ots files (docs/data/status_history.json.ots fd9d0a8d, proofs/predictions_manifest.json.ots 411ec05e, proofs/weekly_predictions_2026-03-06.json.ots 5b9478e4, status_history.json.ots 3d3df225); no new prediction-isolation file; proofs/weekly_predictions_2026-03-15.json STILL has no .ots companion (~7+ weeks). Content-security sweep clean (0 prompt-injection phrases on any of 6 pages, 0 hidden-CSS anomalies). Author-contact prior NOT invoked — zero published-surface change to attribute, zero dome-side responsiveness signal in this poll-window. 2 chg-* files written: this one (substantive MEDIUM cadence-rollup; HOLD #12 = 3rd consecutive gated; manual drought ~32min from 16d threshold; eclipse_days flipped 101->100; 8 EOM PREDs d=3.48 still LOW) and chg-20260503-1130-002 (automated LOW — 9-commit auto rollup including HOLD #12 fire). Watch for next poll (~12h, ~2026-05-03T23Z): (1) Manual-commit drought has crossed 16d threshold by then (~+8.5h past 12:02Z). (2) ALL 8 April-EOM PREDs at d=4.0 — first poll under Step 10b day-4-7 SEVERITY MEDIUM (write a chg-* specifically about the lapse). (3) Any source-file touch -> CRITICAL. (4) Any new OTS file referencing predictions-only -> CANARY TRIGGERED. (5) Sq-subtraction methodology document (per analyst's 04-27T07:12 EXP-267 guidance) — if it appears, classify likely-responsive per author-contact prior. (6) Manual-approval-gate hypothesis now confirmed at 3-event threshold; analyst should consider escalating the implication to operator-facing surfaces (the dome's daily-AI-review pipeline is auto-firing but its registry-update step requires a human gate the human is not pulling). (7) Any HOLD #13 fire tomorrow ~07:30Z — if registry-update happens (unlocks the gate), the manual-approval-gate hypothesis is corroborated by inversion. PRESERVATION NOTE: this poll preserves analyst/decider/curmudgeon last_run + note + notes_this_run + patches_applied_this_run + issues_*_this_run + open_issues + closed_issues + curmudgeon_* + pat_note_resolved_by_operator + last_decider_* + last_analyst_* intact, only updating poll-owned fields (last_run/last_agent/run_type/mode/status, last_poll, changes_pending_analysis, consecutive_quiet_polls, last_poll_note, prev_agent_run).
